title: centaurium suffruticosum
intro: Centaurium suffruticosum, also known as low-growing centaury, is a small, perennial plant belonging to the gentian family. Traditionally, Centaurium suffruticosum has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of iridoid glycosides. The medicinal properties of Centaurium suffruticosum have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antispasmodic effects. Centaurium suffruticosum is often prepared in the form of tea, tincture, or infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
